name: nuke-skills
description: Convergent multi-agent quality protocols: deep audits, diff reviews, implementation verification, phased fix-spec execution, feature spec compilation, root-cause debugging, mutation-proven tests, a deep-reasoning discipline, and an always-on everyday loop routed by an ambient constitution

plugins.name: nuke
plugins.description: Multi-agent quality skills — nuke-audit (convergent codebase audit), nuke-review (diff/PR review), nuke-verify (implementation verification with fix loop), nuke-fix (phased fix-spec execution), nuke-spec (feature request → build spec), nuke-debug (root-cause bug fixing), nuke-test (behavior tests proven by mutation), nuke-think (deep-reasoning discipline for judgment roles and hard calls), nuke-code (always-on everyday loop: THINK → BUILD → SHIP with a fresh ship validator) — plus the ambient constitution, injected at session start, that routes ordinary work into the right protocol
